title: hymenophyllum lanatum
intro: Hymenophyllum lanatum, also known as the hairy polypody fern, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum lanatum include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as a digestive aid. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
